notableEvents.label: Carson Benge reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Carson Benge reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Jared Triolo. Brett Baty to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Yorke pinch-hit

notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo grounds into a double play, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Marcus Semien to first baseman Brett Baty. Ryan O'Hearn out at 2nd. Jared Triolo out at 1st.
